sessions.name: Enter Data
sessions.description: Enter data by hand, or paste CSV/JSON.
sessions.keywords: enter data enter data by hand, or paste csv/json. sources blankcolumn

sessions.name: Random
sessions.description: Generate a column of random values.
sessions.keywords: random generate a column of random values. sources random

sessions.name: Sequence Column
sessions.description: Create a numeric or time sequence column.
sessions.keywords: sequence column create a numeric or time sequence column. sources sequencecolumn

sessions.name: Simulate Data
sessions.description: Generate a synthetic time-series table from a cosine + noise model.
sessions.keywords: simulate data generate a synthetic time-series table from a cosine + noise model. sources simulateddata

sessions.name: Add
sessions.description: Add a constant or column to the input column.
sessions.keywords: add add a constant or column to the input column. arithmetic add

sessions.name: Substitute
sessions.description: Find a specific value in the column and replace it with another (e.g. swap a missing-data code like −999 for a different value).
sessions.keywords: substitute find a specific value in the column and replace it with another (e.g. swap a missing-data code like −999 for a different value). arithmetic sub

sessions.name: Multiply
sessions.description: Multiply the input column by a constant or another column.
sessions.keywords: multiply multiply the input column by a constant or another column. arithmetic multiply

sessions.name: Normalize
sessions.description: Normalize the column to a chosen range or by a reference value.
sessions.keywords: normalize normalize the column to a chosen range or by a reference value. arithmetic normalize

sessions.name: Column Function
sessions.description: Apply a per-column aggregate function (mean, sum, etc.) across rows or groups.
sessions.keywords: column function apply a per-column aggregate function (mean, sum, etc.) across rows or groups. arithmetic columnfunctions

sessions.name: Formula Column
sessions.description: Compute a new column from a user-supplied formula referencing other columns.
sessions.keywords: formula column compute a new column from a user-supplied formula referencing other columns. arithmetic formulacolumn

sessions.name: Filter
sessions.description: Filter rows based on the values of another column.
sessions.keywords: filter filter rows based on the values of another column. filtering filterbyothercol

sessions.name: Remove Outliers
sessions.description: Detect and remove outliers from the column.
sessions.keywords: remove outliers detect and remove outliers from the column. filtering outlierremoval

sessions.name: Remove Trend
sessions.description: Remove a fitted trend (linear, polynomial, etc.) from the column.
sessions.keywords: remove trend remove a fitted trend (linear, polynomial, etc.) from the column. filtering removetrend

sessions.name: Sort
sessions.description: Sort rows by a chosen column, keeping the selected columns aligned (ascending or descending).
sessions.keywords: sort sort rows by a chosen column, keeping the selected columns aligned (ascending or descending). filtering sort

sessions.name: Smooth Data
sessions.description: Smooth a column using LOESS, moving average, Savitzky-Golay, or Whittaker-Eilers.
sessions.keywords: smooth data smooth a column using loess, moving average, savitzky-golay, or whittaker-eilers. smoothing smootheddata

sessions.name: Bin Data
sessions.description: Bin time-series values into regular intervals and aggregate per bin.
sessions.keywords: bin data bin time-series values into regular intervals and aggregate per bin. binning binneddata

sessions.name: Cosinor
sessions.description: Fit a cosinor model (period, amplitude, acrophase) to the column.
sessions.keywords: cosinor fit a cosinor model (period, amplitude, acrophase) to the column. fitting cosinor

sessions.name: Double Logistic
sessions.description: Fit a double-logistic curve to the column (useful for phenology / on-off transitions).
sessions.keywords: double logistic fit a double-logistic curve to the column (useful for phenology / on-off transitions). fitting doublelogistic

sessions.name: Fit Function
sessions.description: Fit an arbitrary user-supplied function to the column.
sessions.keywords: fit function fit an arbitrary user-supplied function to the column. fitting fitfunction

sessions.name: Rectangular Wave
sessions.description: Fit a rectangular (square) wave model with adjustable duty cycle.
sessions.keywords: rectangular wave fit a rectangular (square) wave model with adjustable duty cycle. fitting rectangularwave

sessions.name: Fit Trend Curves
sessions.description: Fit and store a trend (linear, polynomial, exponential, logarithmic) over the column.
sessions.keywords: fit trend curves fit and store a trend (linear, polynomial, exponential, logarithmic) over the column. fitting trendfit

sessions.name: Compare groups (stats)
sessions.description: Compare statistics between groups defined by another column.
sessions.keywords: compare groups (stats) compare statistics between groups defined by another column. analysis groupcomparison

sessions.name: Moving Analysis
sessions.description: Compute a rolling-window analysis across the column.
sessions.keywords: moving analysis compute a rolling-window analysis across the column. analysis movinganalysis

sessions.name: Rhythmicity Analysis
sessions.description: Run rhythmicity statistics over the column.
sessions.keywords: rhythmicity analysis run rhythmicity statistics over the column. analysis rhythmicityanalysis

sessions.name: Nonparametric RA
sessions.description: Nonparametric rest-activity variables (IS, IV, RA, M10/L5) — robust to non-sinusoidal rhythms.
sessions.keywords: nonparametric ra nonparametric rest-activity variables (is, iv, ra, m10/l5) — robust to non-sinusoidal rhythms. analysis nonparametricra

sessions.name: Edit value
sessions.description: Edit or substitute individual values in a column.
sessions.keywords: edit value edit or substitute individual values in a column. transform editvalue

sessions.name: Collect Columns
sessions.description: Collect (concatenate) several columns into one.
sessions.keywords: collect columns collect (concatenate) several columns into one. transform collectcolumns

sessions.name: Long To Wide
sessions.description: Pivot a long-format table into wide format.
sessions.keywords: long to wide pivot a long-format table into wide format. transform longtowide

sessions.name: Split data
sessions.description: Split a column or table on a delimiter or group key.
sessions.keywords: split data split a column or table on a delimiter or group key. transform split

sessions.name: Stored Value Group
sessions.description: Group derived stored values together for reuse.
sessions.keywords: stored value group group derived stored values together for reuse. transform storedvaluegroup

sessions.name: Wide To Long
sessions.description: Pivot a wide-format table into long format.
sessions.keywords: wide to long pivot a wide-format table into long format. transform widetolong

sessions.name: Scatter — activity vs hour
sessions.description: A simple scatterplot of a noisy ~24 h rhythmic signal against hours since start (7 days, hourly).
sessions.keywords: scatter — activity vs hour a simple scatterplot of a noisy ~24 h rhythmic signal against hours since start (7 days, hourly). plots scatterplot

sessions.name: Histogram — distribution
sessions.description: Histogram of 500 samples drawn from a normal distribution (mean 100, sd 15).
sessions.keywords: histogram — distribution histogram of 500 samples drawn from a normal distribution (mean 100, sd 15). plots histogram

sessions.name: Boxplot — activity by day
sessions.description: Boxplot of daily activity values grouped by day index (7 days × 24 hourly points).
sessions.keywords: boxplot — activity by day boxplot of daily activity values grouped by day index (7 days × 24 hourly points). plots boxplot

sessions.name: Actogram — multi-day activity
sessions.description: Actogram of a noisy ~24 h rhythm over 7 days (hourly samples).
sessions.keywords: actogram — multi-day activity actogram of a noisy ~24 h rhythm over 7 days (hourly samples). plots actogram

sessions.name: Periodogram — period detection
sessions.description: Lomb–Scargle periodogram of a ~24 h rhythm (7 days, hourly).
sessions.keywords: periodogram — period detection lomb–scargle periodogram of a ~24 h rhythm (7 days, hourly). plots periodogram

sessions.name: Correlogram — autocorrelation
sessions.description: Autocorrelogram of a ~24 h rhythm (7 days, hourly).
sessions.keywords: correlogram — autocorrelation autocorrelogram of a ~24 h rhythm (7 days, hourly). plots correlogram

sessions.name: FFT — frequency spectrum
sessions.description: Fourier spectrum of a 12 h + 24 h composite rhythm (8 days, hourly).
sessions.keywords: fft — frequency spectrum fourier spectrum of a 12 h + 24 h composite rhythm (8 days, hourly). plots fft

sessions.name: Table — raw columns
sessions.description: A tableplot listing an hour index alongside two derived signals.
sessions.keywords: table — raw columns a tableplot listing an hour index alongside two derived signals. plots tableplot
